landing.headline: $140 billion in benefits go unclaimed every year.
landing.subhead: AccessAid finds government assistance programs you qualify for — and walks you through applying. Free, private, no paperwork headaches.
landing.card1_desc: Answer a few questions and we match you with SNAP, Medicaid, housing, utility help, and more.
landing.card2_desc: Scan or upload your ID, pay stubs, or tax forms. We extract the info and auto-fill future applications.
landing.card3_desc: Ask anything about a program. Get plain-English answers, not government jargon.
landing.footer: AccessAid — Informational guidance only, not legal or financial advice.

auth.signup_subtitle: AccessAid helps you find benefits you qualify for

onboarding.language_subtitle: Choose your language. / Elija su idioma.
onboarding.full_name_subtitle: We'll use this to personalize your experience.
onboarding.age_subtitle: Age determines eligibility for programs like Social Security and SSI.
onboarding.state_title: Which state do you live in?
onboarding.income_subtitle: Include all income sources for your household.
onboarding.household_title: How many people are in your household?
onboarding.household_subtitle: Include yourself and everyone you live and share expenses with.
onboarding.citizenship_subtitle: Some programs are available regardless of status. Your data is private and secure.
onboarding.children_title: Do you have any children under 18?
onboarding.disability_subtitle: Some programs like SSI and SSDI are specifically for people with disabilities.
onboarding.student_subtitle: Includes college, vocational, or other accredited programs.
onboarding.phone_subtitle: Optional — helps pre-fill account creation forms on government sites.
onboarding.consent_subtitle: Please review how we handle your data.
onboarding.consent_item1: Your data is encrypted in storage and in transit
onboarding.consent_item2: We only extract key information from documents — not the documents themselves
onboarding.consent_item3: Original files are automatically deleted within 24 hours of upload
onboarding.consent_item4: We never sell or share your data
onboarding.consent_item5: You can delete your data at any time in Settings
onboarding.consent_item6: We store only the last 4 digits of any Social Security number
onboarding.consent_agree: I understand and agree to the privacy terms above. I consent to AccessAid storing my information to help find eligible programs.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.matched_programs_empty: Complete your profile to see recommended programs here.
dashboard.strong_desc: These look like the best use of your time based on your profile.
dashboard.possible_desc: May still fit — especially if your situation has details the screener didn't capture.
dashboard.informational_note: Informational only. Final eligibility confirmed by the official application.

program_detail.disclaimer: This is informational guidance only and does not constitute legal or financial advice.
program_detail.next_step_3: Click "Start Application" to begin with AI assistance

application_form.submitted_body: Remember to save your confirmation number. Submit directly at
application_form.autofill_hint: Fields highlighted in {{blue}} were auto-filled from your profile. Fields in {{yellow}} still need your input.
application_form.mark_submitted: I've submitted on the official site

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Upload documents to auto-fill your applications.
documents.empty: No documents yet. Upload one to auto-fill your applications.
documents.preview_unavailable: Preview is not available for this file type.
documents.delete_confirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Extracted facts will remain in your profile.

chat.greeting_general: Ask me about any benefits programs you may qualify for. I can explain eligibility, required documents, or help you navigate the application process.
chat.greeting_program: I'm here to help with your **{{programName}}** application. Ask me anything about a field, what information you need, or whether you qualify.
chat.disclaimer: _This is informational guidance only and does not constitute legal or financial advice._
chat.mic_denied: Microphone access denied. Allow mic access and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.facts_subtitle: Used to auto-fill your applications. Built from onboarding, uploaded documents, and forms you've filled out.
settings.delete_facts_confirm: Delete all stored facts? This will clear auto-fill data from your profile.
settings.delete_account_desc: Permanently deletes your account, profile, all stored facts, documents, and application history. Cannot be undone.
